_comment_top: Example MCP server configuration fragment. Paste the mcpServers object into your client configuration (for example claude_desktop_config.json on macOS at ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json). Replace absolute paths with your local checkout locations.

mcpServers._comment_future_adapters: The entries below are commented stubs showing how future governance-platform MCP adapters would slot in alongside AIGovOps. Uncomment and populate when those adapters exist. The aigovops server produces artifacts; an adapter server pushes them to an external GRC system.
